---
title: "Roadmap"
---

How every module depends on the others. Blue nodes are reusable
[foundations](../../foundations/README.md) modules shared across courses; arrows
mean "needed for".

Like every course, this one assumes the notation grammar in
[reading-math-notation](../../foundations/reading-math-notation/lesson.qmd) — take it
first if the symbols aren't yet second nature.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef foundation fill:#e8f0fe,stroke:#4285f4

    F1["vectors-and-summation<br/>(x_i, n, Σ, sum rules)"]:::foundation
    F2["mean-variance-covariance<br/>(x̄, s², cov, cor)"]:::foundation
    F3["derivative-as-slope<br/>(slope of a curve, slope_at)"]:::foundation
    F4["loss-functions-and-optimization<br/>(loss function, set derivative = 0)"]:::foundation
    F5["differentiation-rules<br/>(power rule, chain rule)"]:::foundation
    F6["partial-derivatives-and-the-gradient<br/>(∂f/∂a, one knob at a time)"]:::foundation
    F7["randomness-samples-and-sampling-distributions<br/>(sampling distribution, standard error)"]:::foundation
    F8["hypothesis-tests-p-values-and-confidence-intervals<br/>(t statistic, p-value, CI)"]:::foundation
    M1["01 · Lines & the least-squares idea<br/>(β₀, β₁, ŷ, residuals, SSE, argmin)"]
    M2["02 · Deriving the OLS formulas<br/>(the calc tricks + the derivation)"]
    M3["03 · Reading lm() output & papers<br/>(SE, t, p, R², paper tables)"]
    M4["04 · Capstone<br/>(decode a real regression, end to end)"]

    F1 --> F2
    F1 --> M1
    F2 --> M1
    F3 --> F4
    F1 --> F4
    F4 --> F5
    F3 --> F5
    F3 --> F6
    F1 --> F6
    F4 --> F6
    F2 --> M2
    F5 --> M2
    F6 --> M2
    F4 --> M2
    M1 --> M2
    F2 --> F7
    F7 --> F8
    F8 --> M3
    M2 --> M3
    M3 --> M4
```

## Suggested order

1. Foundation: [vectors-and-summation](../../foundations/vectors-and-summation/lesson.qmd) —
   new? take it fully; done before? skim its pronunciation table.
2. Foundation: [derivative-as-slope](../../foundations/derivative-as-slope/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
3. Foundation: [mean-variance-covariance](../../foundations/mean-variance-covariance/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
4. Foundation: [loss-functions-and-optimization](../../foundations/loss-functions-and-optimization/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
5. Foundation: [differentiation-rules](../../foundations/differentiation-rules/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
6. Foundation: [partial-derivatives-and-the-gradient](../../foundations/partial-derivatives-and-the-gradient/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
7. [01 · Lines and the least-squares idea](modules/01-least-squares-idea/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/01-least-squares-idea/practice.qmd))
8. [02 · Deriving the OLS formulas](modules/02-deriving-the-ols-formulas/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/02-deriving-the-ols-formulas/practice.qmd))
9. Foundation: [randomness-samples-and-sampling-distributions](../../foundations/randomness-samples-and-sampling-distributions/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
10. Foundation: [hypothesis-tests-p-values-and-confidence-intervals](../../foundations/hypothesis-tests-p-values-and-confidence-intervals/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
11. [03 · Reading lm() output and papers](modules/03-reading-lm-output-and-papers/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/03-reading-lm-output-and-papers/practice.qmd))
12. [04 · Capstone — reading a real regression](modules/04-capstone-reading-a-real-regression/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/04-capstone-reading-a-real-regression/practice.qmd))

After each lesson, do its practice page before moving on — the problems are the part
that makes it stick. External videos/posts for each module: [resources](resources.md).
